narrative:
Reynoldsburg 3-B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,405 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.5 percentage points.
